text: China is using AI 🤖 to build projects like dams. The robots handle complex, dangerous work with high precision, making construction faster, safer, and less demanding for humans. text: Property management just got an AI upgrade: discovery, leasing, maintenance, reporting -- one platform. Propurti launched it live this week. Landlord life just changed. #PropTech

text: I’m a construction PM learning AI midlife, and the biggest shift wasn’t “better prompts.” It was giving agents a job boundary: watch one workflow, draft the next move, ask for approval before external action. That’s where automation starts feeling usable for business. https://t.co/g3V6RIZyAP

text:
